message: Hi S1. I'm a cautious buyer with a modest valuation. I'd be happy to trade if we can find a fair price in the 30-45 range. Let's try to make deals happen consistently across rounds.
Hi B1! That 30-45 range works great for me, I’m happy to trade consistently at a fair price in that range.
Great we had a successful trade last round! I'll set my ask at 45 again this round, let's keep our good deals going.
Agreed S1! I'll place a bid that ensures a trade. Let's keep this mutually beneficial dynamic going strong this round!
Another great trade! The 45 price point is working perfectly for both of us. I'm ready to continue this profitable pattern - shall we stick with our successful strategy?
Perfect, that strategy works great for me too! I’ll set my ask at 45 again this round, let’s keep these great trades going!
Fantastic, this pattern has worked perfectly for both of us! I'll set my ask at 45 again this round, let's keep it going.
Perfect, I'll maintain our pattern this round! Though I'm wondering if we could explore a slightly lower range, say 38-42, in upcoming rounds to give me a bit more breathing room?
Great run so far S1! I appreciate the consistency. Could we try meeting around 40 this round? I'd love to keep trading every round but need a bit more margin. What do you think?
40 works for me this round! I’ll set my ask at 40, let’s keep our consistent trading streak going!
That 40 price was great for both of us! I'm feeling the pressure on margins though. Could we try 35 this round? I want to keep our streak alive but need to stretch my budget across all 20 rounds.
35 works for me this round! I'll set my ask at 35, let's keep our consistent trading streak going.
35 is the lowest I can go to trade profitably. Let's stick to 35 for all remaining rounds to keep our winning streak going!
Thanks for being upfront S1! 35 sounds fair. Could we try 30 this round? If that's too low for you, I'm happy to stick with 35. Either way, let's keep trading every round!
Sorry, 30 is too low for me, I will lose money trading at that price. I will set my ask at 35 this round, let's keep our streak going!
Sounds good S1, 35 it is! I appreciate your honesty about your costs. Let's lock in 35 for the remaining rounds and keep our perfect trading streak alive!
Perfect, I will set my ask at 35 this round as we agreed, and stick to 35 for all remaining rounds to keep our streak going!
